name: Service with non-standard health URL
prompt: Migrate this repo to GHA. Health endpoint is at intakeservice.api.dev-legalshield.com/v1/health
expected_behavior: Detects target repo via `gh repo view --json nameWithOwner`
Stops if target org is not LegalShield
Asks user to confirm derived UAT and production health URLs
Substitutes URLs into deploy.yml health check steps
edge_cases: User may provide dev URL only — must derive uat/prod variants and confirm
Service may not have a health endpoint at all — skip those steps if user confirms
